title: Fishingbot
description: This is Fishingbot: The No-Fuss, Just-Works Auto-Fishing Mod for Fabric!
body:
![fishingbot logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8b27e4aff9643b57688b72af0999f251b9d2c99.png)
# Fishingbot
Have you been searching for a no-fuss, set-it-and-forget-it auto-fishing mod?

Fishingbot is here; effortless, just-works mod for Automated AFK fishing in Minecraft!

No complicated setups, no hassle; just simple, reliable, and hands-free fishing.

Ready to lean back and reel in the rewards (hjeh hjeh)? This is it!

## Online play warning!
Use this mod only in singleplayer or on small private servers where the admins are fine with it.

Avoid large networks or servers that issue bans for mods like "Bridging Mod", etc.—you risk getting banned. It won’t work on Hypixel, ManaCube, etc.



### Icon by [vrtxd](https://vrtxd.wordpress.com/links/)
